title: tillandsia amoena
intro: Tillandsia amoena, also known as the purple quill or rose quill, is a species of air plant that belongs to the bromeliad family. It is native to South America and is prized for its vibrant purple flowers, which bloom from the center of the plant. The medicinal properties of Tillandsia amoena include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions.
